generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python application that interfaces with crane controllers to collect operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalCraneDataTransmitted
]

instance PhysicalCraneDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Data stream from Physical Crane to Physical Crane Interface"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance CraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data logged into TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalCraneDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization using context and container diagrams to represent high-level components and their interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationEnabler
]

instance LoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for historical data logging into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization using C4 Model architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging to enable traceability and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operations for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation between physical and digital models to ensure synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical traceability and analysis capabilities for crane operations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane status for operational awareness"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation insights ensuring synchronization between physical and digital twins"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic optimal control actions for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for research and educational applications in industrial automation"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, CraneController
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component of the physical gantry crane"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are executed by the Control Application via the Physical Crane Interface to control the Physical Crane. The document does not specify command message formats, validation mechanisms, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, or command execution confirmation details."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate using MQTT Broker for signaling and TimescaleDB for data storage. Grafana Dashboard retrieves data from TimescaleDB for visualization. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline implementation, utilizing AutomationML as a standard for model interoperability and ActiveMQ message broker for data exchange between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses the C4 Model [5] for architecture visualization and description, which is applied to the gantry crane system despite being tailored for software architectures."
]
